title: Emerald and Things
description: This mod adds emerald tools, variable items and crafts to impossible items to craft in vanilla!
body:
![A brand new trees added by my mod!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbdd8927b6eb02abc5277e339a4f87f3c4b9ec02.png)

#  description:

**Hello!**

This mod adds emerald tools!

Like ~~emerald pickaxe~~, ~~emerald sword~~, ~~emerald axe~~, and some variable things!

This mods require [curios-api 4.1.0.0+](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)

If you want to suggest things, go to our discord server!

The distribution to 3d party is allowed, you can share this to modpacks, servers, everything!

**Good Luck Playing.**
